title: MCP Security, Prompt Injection, and Supply Chain Trust · Protocol Clinic: Confused Deputy
summary: Threat-model an MCP server consuming untrusted content and exposing write tools. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext confused deputy increment in an MCP security test suite and operating policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bind actions to user intent, authorization, audience, and protected resource.
Treat external resource and tool content as untrusted data that cannot redefine authority.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
